Detroit (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,790,139Details
International Box Office $9,243,424
Worldwide Box Office $26,033,563
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of one of the darkest moments during the civil unrest that rocked Detroit in the summer of '67…

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$350,190 (2.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:20 opening theaters/3,007 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,386,848

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 28th, 2017 (Limited) by Annapurna Pictures
August 4th, 2017 (Expands Wide) by Annapurna Pictures
International Releases: August 25th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Portugal)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Spain)
September 29th, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: November 28th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and pervasive language.
(Rating bulletin 2484 (Cert #51036), 7/12/2017)
Running Time: 143 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue
Geographical setting: Detroit
Plot point: African Americans, Beat Cops, Corrupt Cops, Police Shooting, Police Standoff, Riots
Social setting: Civil Rights Movement, Hood Film
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Annapurna Pictures, First Light
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
